session_note: S46 — BUG-CRITICAL-4 host-side Begin Match button never appears once joiner connects. User-reported regression post-S45 2-peer smoke. Phase A.0 diagnostic instrumentation chosen (lowest risk, highest signal) over blanket-defensive-patch + Playwright-harness-first. S45 commit diff confirms NO lobby code was touched — root cause is one of: (H1) Trystero one-way handshake leaving host peerCount=0 while joiner shows connected; (H2) avatarRenderer.sync throwing silently in LOBBY breaking ticker frame downstream; (H3) pre-existing latent race unmasked by S45 state flow changes. Phase A.0 ships a host-side mirror of the joiner diagnostic strip (lobbyScreen.ts:399-408 + main.ts:909-933) showing peerCount + mode + hostConnected + NetTransport strategy summary. User 2-peer smoke + screenshot → empirical root cause → Phase B targeted fix PDR with Council.
council_invoked: DEFERRED to Phase B per State-Discovery GATE Rule 21 — Council deliberates ON empirical 2-peer data, not on guesses. Phase A.0 (Micro, ~5K) ships read-only instrumentation; Council fires post-data.
active_pdr: Inline in session HANDOFF_2026-05-24_S45close.md follow-up + S46 chat turn. To be archived as .claude/plans/IN-PROGRESS_S46_BUG-CRITICAL-4_begin-match-regression.md after Phase A.0 data returns.
